# Eva Icons

- **Source**: https://github.com/akveo/eva-icons
- **Site**: https://akveo.github.io/eva-icons
- **Author**: Akveo
- **License**: MIT (see `LICENSE.txt`)
- **Version fetched**: depth-1 clone, 2026-04-21
- **Icon count**: ~495 SVGs (two styles: fill + outline)
- **Style**: 24x24 grid, outline and filled pair per concept
- **Raw SVG path**: `package/icons/fill/` and `package/icons/outline/`

## Contents

- `package/icons/fill/` — filled variants
- `package/icons/outline/` — outline variants
- `LICENSE.txt` — MIT
- `README.md` — upstream readme

## Consolidate notes

- Paired outline/filled grammar — useful for toggle states (inactive outline → active filled).
- Rounded terminals, slightly softer than Feather/Lucide. Less retro-geometric than Clawmachine's Mac OS 9 base but works for secondary UI ornament.
- No animation assets kept (the upstream eva-icons react package wasn't cloned; this is just the static SVG set).
